title: The Career Buccaneer adds six modifier

card.rawText: For 1 turn cycle add +6 to the equipped creature's Modifier.

plan.title: The Career Buccaneer adds six modifier
plan.summary: Equip The Career Buccaneer to a modifier-zero creature and verify its effective modifier increases by 6.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the +6 Modifier bonus is isolated.

steps: Equip The Career Buccaneer to player_1 primary creature.
Read the equipped creature's effective modifier.

expectedAssertions.label: The Career Buccaneer remains equipped/on field

manualVerification: Confirm the +6 Modifier expires after one full turn cycle.
riskNotes: This fixture validates the active modifier layer, not expiry timing.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
